# Flipped:Chat with AI Character · AI Chat

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:51 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Feature requests](#theme-feature_requests)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Toni Goodacre_, Jul 19, 2026, 4/5: "I gave it a 4 only for this one problem and one problem only, I'm talking to one of the bots or something and it says i need to verify im old enough when I clearly am and when I press on the blue link it sends me to a switch and when i press it I have to pay for it. quite annoying but overall amazing app but pls fix this bug thank you again!"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      3 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 25, 2026 - Jul 12, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Mary Jane_, Jul 12, 2026, 1/5: "it says in other comments how it has no paywall well I hate to tell you that's a lie you can't do basically anything unless you want to spend money"
            2. _V. W._, Jun 25, 2026, 4/5: "The App is great, really enjoyable and fun. But i don't see a reason to buy a subscription anymore. At least the "Story-Economic-Mode" should be integrated for free when you buy gold or Platin subscription. Otherwise there is no use in paying for the App and see a value in purchasing if i anyway have to pay for longer or better chats and especially when you buy Platinum for the permanent memory but this only Works when you also use gems for the story-modes! permanent memory only Works with Gems!"

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      4 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 14, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _John Doe_, Jul 15, 2026, 2/5: "With the most recent update the model has very bad memory - it cant remember anything after two prompts. And even though I like not having ads and the cool down when I chat I still wish we could see 10 ads per day to get more rewards in-app. Many apps have it so why doesn't Flipped have it? it's a win win both for costumers and the company."
            2. _Cory Brown (Phenom)_, Jul 14, 2026, 4/5: "would love to see a external chat system, otherwise, love it"
